title: verbascum × keklikolukense
intro: Verbascum × keklikolukense, also known as the hybridized Turkish mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the figwort family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and wounds, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Traditionally, Verbascum × keklikolukense is used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
